title: Imu Steps Out from the Empty Throne
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Sabo, King Bekori, Buggy, Unknown person #9 as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Its close proximity.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I will make necessary prepara- Tions.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I humbly request your patience in the meantime.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It shall be as you say.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Five Elder planets defense science warrior God St. Jay Garcia Saturn

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luusia's citizens have shown sparks of rebellion recently.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We may be able to make an example out of them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FIVE ELDER PLANETS ENVIRONMENTAL WARRIOR GOD ST. MARKUS MARS

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Five Elder planets justice Warrior God Topman Valcurie

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we could one day use this power freely...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Five Elder planets Finance Warrior God Ethan Baron V. NUSJURO

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We could instantly sniff out any protected conflict...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Five Elder planets agriculture Warrior God ShepARD JU PETER

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: One more thing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Of course.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Retrieve VIVI...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: As you wish.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: mean- while...

dialogue.speaker: King Bekori
dialogue.text: the kingdom of tajine and...

dialogue.speaker: King Bekori
dialogue.text: ...the Aegis Kingdom are both rebelling!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: between the disbanding of the seven warlords...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and the uprisings in government affiliated nations, the Navy has their hands full.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: deploy the Sera- Phim!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How- Ever...

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Crocodile was spotted...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: On Empire Bluffs Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...their military power had already gone in a new direction.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The second we docked at Luluia...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the people arrested King Seki and Princess Komane.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They were just waiting to ambush the Royals.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since I was a stowaway, they welcomed me with open arms.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That's when I saw the papers...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And found out that they pinned King Cobra's murder on me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unsurprisingly, the people there considered me a hero... I wanted to tell them the truth, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I saw how that lie fanned the flames of rebellion within them, the words died in my mouth....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Betty and the others had already inspired a lot of them...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and I ended up bringing many of those hopeful recruits back with me.

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
